title: Axon Technologies (OLD)
description: Axon T.e.c.h.n.o.l.o.g.i.e.s., Also referred as Axon Technologies or axontechnologies adds new ores, armor with their own tool types, status effects, mobs, dimensions, and more. It is currently still being developed, so bugs may occur.
body:
# Axon T.e.c.h.n.o.l.o.g.i.e.s.
#### aka Axon Technologies or axontechnologies

### THE ONLY OFFICAL VERSIONS OF THIS MOD ARE ON CURSEFORGE AND MODRINTH!

### [NEW VERSION HERE](https://modrinth.com/mod/axontechnologies)

# 📌Dependencies

Geckolib and Fabric API are required and a recipe viewer mod (REI, EMI, JEI, etc.) is recommended.

#  ❓About
### If you like any of the features below you should download and use this mod. For more information, please visit the [ wiki](https://github.com/StickManM/axontechnologies/wiki).

#### New ores
These ores include mimicarium ore, deepslate mimicarium ore, void coal ore, dreadstone thunderanium ore, fakestone and fake slate iron and gold ores, dreadstone diamond ore, dreadstone netherite ore, thunderanium ore, and corruptinite ore.

#### New armor and toolsets
Thunderanium armor and tools are made with thunderanium ingots and give the Glitchster effect when a full set of armor is worn. Red thunderanium armor and tools give better effects and are better than thunderanium armor and tools. It is made with a red thunderanium ingot and a thunderanium armor piece (red thunderanium tools don't need thunderanium tools). The antiglitch sword is a sword made with dark essence and a red thunderanium sword. Its base stats are worse than a red thunderanium sword, but it gives Antiglitchster when you use it to attack. Dark thunderanium is a stronger version of red thunderanium. It gives you Glitchster 3 and is very powerful. To create the armor you need dark thunderanium ingots and red thunderanium armor. To create the tools you need dark essence, red thunderanium tools (the sword requires an antiglitch sword), and dark thunderanium ingots. Corruptinite is similar to dark thunderanium, but you need to mine the corruptinite ore to get unstable corruptinite (which can be stabilized using dark essence). To create tools and armor you need the red thunderanium tool/armor and corruptinite (swords also require an antiglitch sword). Dark thunderanium swords give the target Anti Corrupted Glitchster and give you Glitchster 4. Corruptinite swords give the target Antiglitchster and give you Corrupted Glitchster 2. A very IMPORTANT thing is that you can not use a corruptinite sword with dark thunderanium armor and vice versa. Trying it will give you Antiglitchster/Anti Corrupted Glitchster. Axon Alloy Armor and tool types are different types of armor like dark thunderanium and corruptinite. Type A gives Glitchster and Corrupted Glitchster 4, Type C gives Corrupted Glitchster 5, and Type G gives Glitchster 5.

#### New dimensions 
These new dimensions include the Mimic World, Dread Caverns, and Thunderlands. The Mimic World looks like the overworld at a first glance, but is made out of fakestone, fakeslate, and a biome called the Mimic Plains. It has the resources to get to the Dread Caverns. The Dread Caverns is an underground dimension filled with diamonds and thunderanium. It also has a lot of mobs including the illusioner and Lost Miner. The Thunderlands is a dimension with more thunderanium ore and the Red Essence Zombie. This dimension is vital to creating red thunderanium gear. One of the newest dimensions called the Corruptionlands seems to be a lot like the Thunderlands. Maybe it could be a future version of the Thunderlands. Lore aside, in this dimension the Dark Essence Zombie spawns and corruptinite ore generates. To create a portal to this dimension use corruption portal frames and the Corruption Gateway (similar to the Thunderlands portal and Mimic World portal). The gallery has images of how the portals look.

#### New effects 
These new effects include Glitchster 1, 2, 3,4, 5, Antiglitchster, Thunder Poisoning,  Corrupted Glitchster 3, 4, 5, Anti Corrupted Glitchster, and Neutralized Glitchster. Glitchster is an effect given when wearing a full set of thunderanium, red thunderanium, or dark thunderanium armor. Depending on which armor you wear is what decides your level of Glitchster. For example, thunderanium has Glitchster 1 while dark thunderanium has Glitchster 3. Antiglitchster is an effect that removes the Glitchster effect making it easier to kill you. Corrupted Glitchster is an effect given by wearing corruptinite armor. It is immune to Antiglitchster but has its own anti variant which is Anti Corrupted Glitchster (called Glitchster in-game), but it is not as powerful as Antiglitchster as you still have some speed. Neutralized Glitchster is an effect given to you when you have Glitchster 3 or above. When you get Antiglitchster, Neutralized Glitchster kicks in to give you a weaker version of Glitchster.  Thunder Poisoning is an effect given when you are in liquid thunder which is a custom fluid. It can be very deadly especially if you don't have proper gear. Glitch X (aka GX) is an effect that boosts your speed by a lot. It can make you very fast and to get the effect you must craft a bucket of GX Formula. Then if you submerge yourself in the formula you will get the effect, but an important thing to note is that every second you are in the formula you have a 10% chance to die instantly.

#### New Mobs
The Lost Miner is a mob that spawns in the Dread Caverns. Legends say they are miners who wanted to get rich from the Dread Caverns’ resources but something happened to them to make sure they never returned. This mob will attack you whenever it can due to greed of wanting the treasures for themselves. The Red Essence Zombie is a very fast, very strong, very deadly, very scary, and very dumb mob. It can spot you from a distance and if you hit one all of them will be alerted. Luckily the Red Essence Zombie is dumb and has a horrible path finding meaning that you can outrun it most of the time with Glitchster. Another thing to be careful of is to not let them gang up on you because if they do you are dead. The Dark Essence Zombie is a corrupted version of the Red Essence Zombie and it inhabits the Corruptionlands. It is more deadly than its uncorrupted counterpart because it gives you the Antiglitchster effect. So unless you have Corrupted Glitchster 3+ or Glitchster 3+, killing these mobs and collecting dark essence is going to be a pain.


# 🗺️Wiki
To find out how to play please look at the [ wiki](https://github.com/StickManM/axontechnologies/wiki). The wiki is still in beta, so errors can occur. Please create an issue on the issue tracker for errors.

## ❗Disclaimer
There is more to be added to this mod and some things are yet to be fully implemented or are planned and not yet added. This is due to the mod still being developed. 

## 🤝Credits
- Jaboc0 for help with making the wiki and beta testing the mod.
- NateyNight and BosmanThe_BOOFIN for some of the textures and ideas.

## 📌Some cool things to know
The reason why Technologies is T.e.c.h.n.o.l.o.g.i.e.s. is because it is an acronym. The full name is Axon The Evilish Communist Hive Network Of Logical Octagons Generalizing Illegal Exploiting Systems. This acronym is obviously a joke. This mod is also a newer alpha version of an older mod made by me called The Red Thunderanium Mod and was for Forge versions 1.16.5 and 1.12.2. This version of the mod has many ideas from the old version, but not everything is the same. If you really want to download those old versions then you can go to the abandoned Curseforge page (It is called Axon T.e.c.h.n.o.l.o.g.i.e.s. also).
